disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Small follicle-centred pustules on discrete erythematous bases with normal skin between, in shaved/friction areas, minimal tenderness — superficial folliculitis
trigger_question_examples: Is there a tiny hair in the centre of each spot, and is the skin between the spots normal?
Did they appear in the areas you shaved / that rub on clothing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, each spot has a little hair in the centre, the skin between is normal, and they're where I shaved and my leggings rub.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No deep abscess/furuncle (no large firm fluctuant exquisitely tender nodules), no cellulitis (no hot spreading confluent redness/red streaking), no systemic fever/toxicity
trigger_question_examples: Any large, deep, firm, very painful lumps (boils), or a hot spreading red patch/red streak up the leg?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No big deep painful lumps, no spreading hot redness or red streaks, and no fever.
